name: APPLIED OPTOELECTRONICS, INC.
business: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. is a vertically integrated provider of fiber-optic networking products. It designs and manufactures optical communications products from components to complete turn-key equipment for internet data center, cable television (CATV), telecommunications, and fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) end-markets. The company sells primarily to hyperscale data center operators, CATV equipment manufacturers, telecom network equipment manufacturers, and internet service providers.

exposures.sentence: Recently the hyperscale data center operators have begun to build and upgrade their data centers to support AI, offering us a new growth opportunity.

Our customers in this market are generally large internet-based ("hyperscale") data center operators, along with equipment suppliers who supply our products along with others to our hyperscale data center operator customers.
In the telecom market, we benefit from deployment of new high-speed fiber-optic networks by telecom network operators, including 5G networks.
The CATV market is our most established business, for which we supply a broad array of products, including lasers, transmitters and transceivers, and turn-key equipment.
In the FTTH market, we benefit from continuing passive optical network deployments and system updates among telecom service providers.
Beginning in 2025, nearly all of our CATV equipment sold meets DOCSIS 4.0 standards.

catalysts.event: Expansion of U.S. and Taiwan manufacturing operations to contribute more meaningfully to revenue
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to expand our manufacturing operations in the U.S. and Taiwan, with these two locations contributing more meaningfully to total revenue than in prior years.

catalysts.event: 800 Gbps product sales expected to exceed 400 Gbps product sales
catalysts.sentence: we expect that sales of 800 Gbps products will likely exceed sales of 400 Gbps products later in 2026.
